violations.text: The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a the prep sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Hot sauce was observed being bottled. Establishment to stop bottling hot sauce until a HACCP plan is approved. PIC stated establishment will switch to single service cups. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a the prep sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked beef) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Storage guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Several foods were observed held above 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food has been in unit since yesterday. Product was disposed of. Walk-in was observed set above 41 degrees. Unit was adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Hot sauce was observed being bottled. Establishment to stop bottling hot sauce until a HACCP plan is approved. PIC disposed of existing bottles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a the prep sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The following areas were observed with improper air gaps: 1) Condensate line from walk-in cooler draining into food prep sink 2) Condensate line from walk-in freezer had no air gap 3) Condensate line from ice machine had air break New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024
